# jscanify browser runtime

`jscanify-opencv.js` is copied from the installed `jscanify` package:

`node_modules/jscanify/src/opencv.js`

`jscanify.js` is copied from:

`node_modules/jscanify/src/jscanify.js`

The document scanner loads these files dynamically in the browser. If the
scanner runtime cannot be loaded, the scanner still allows a regular camera
photo upload.
